title: Dakin Tattaunawar Al’umma
subtitle: Tattaunawar al’ummar Musulmi ta duniya • Ku kasance masu mutunci da kirki
authRequiredBody: Da fatan a shiga domin samun damar dakin tattaunawar al’umma.

menu.reportToastDesc: Da fatan a tuntuɓi tallafi idan ka lura da wata matsala.

calls.startedDesc: An wallafa hanyar shiga (link) a cikin tattaunawa.
calls.signInDesc: Da fatan a shiga domin fara kira.

input.placeholder: Rubuta sakonka... (Ku kasance masu mutunci da kirki)
input.cannotSendTitle: Ba za a iya aika sako ba
input.cannotSendDesc: Da fatan a tabbatar ka shiga asusu.

voice.sentDesc: An aika sakon muryarka zuwa tattaunawa.

image.sentDesc: An raba hotonka a cikin tattaunawa.

deleteDialog.title: Goge sako
deleteDialog.desc: Ka tabbata kana so ka goge wannan sakon? Ba za a iya mayarwa ba.

footerNote: Tunatarwa: wannan wuri ne mai albarka ga al’ummarmu. Da fatan a kiyaye tarbiyyar Musulunci.
